purpose: Conceptual overview of the Synapse profile system. Explains what profiles do (modify priorities, constraints, output style, success criteria, context gathering without changing technical capabilities), how to invoke them, profile resolution from {tracker_root}/_commands/profiles/, profile file structure, task-scoped behavior, swarm-mode propagation to workers, and creation guidance for custom profiles.
gotchas: Profile is task-scoped -- agent reverts to default behavior after task
Profiles do NOT change tool access or orchestration protocols -- only persona/priorities/style
Custom profiles have duplicate detection -- alerts on name collision
patterns: Five required sections: Role, Priorities, Constraints, Output Style, Success Criteria
Layered modification: profile sits on top of core instructions
conventions: Priority list ordered, first priority wins on conflict
Constraints framed as explicit 'do NOT' rules
